boundaries.name: domain
boundaries.remediation: Keep domain code framework-neutral and depend only on domain-owned or approved shared utilities.

boundaries.name: application
boundaries.remediation: Depend on domain, contract-family surfaces, and application ports; inject outer implementations from a host.

boundaries.name: contracts
boundaries.remediation: Keep boundary language self-contained and free of business logic or implementation layers.

boundaries.name: adapters
boundaries.remediation: Implement inward-facing ports without importing composition roots, application entry points, or UI.

boundaries.name: hosts
boundaries.remediation: Keep hosts as composition/lifecycle owners; apps may invoke hosts, not the reverse.

boundaries.name: ui
boundaries.remediation: Use UI-facing contracts and clients instead of infrastructure, host, or app internals.

boundaries.name: apps
boundaries.remediation: Keep apps limited to bootstrap, build, and delivery-surface wiring.

allowedViolations.reason: Existing API contract imports application-owned Asset Registry read-facade types pending relocation to a contract family.
Existing IPC contract imports application-owned Asset Registry read-facade types pending relocation to a contract family.
